title: The Fabulous Gold Harvesting Machine
original_title: La fabulosa máquina de cosechar oro
overview: After 40 years working in the mine at Tierra del Fuego, Toto doesn’t qualify for the social security that would allow him to retire. So his son Jorge attempts to build a gold harvesting machine to bring them a better future.
